segments.text: The Lord is a God who avenges.
O God who avenges, shine forth.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Rise up, Judge of the earth; pay back to the proud what they deserve.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: How long, Lord, will the wicked, how long will the wicked be jubilant?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: They pour out arrogant words; all the evildoers are full of boasting.
They crush your people, Lord; they oppress your inheritance.
They slay the widow and the foreigner; they murder the fatherless.
The Lord does not see; the God of Jacob takes no notice.
segments.speaker: Wicked

segments.text: Take notice, you senseless ones among the people; you fools, when will you become wise?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Does he who fashioned the ear not hear? Does he who formed the eye not see?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Does he who disciplines nations not punish? Does he who teaches mankind lack knowledge?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The Lord knows all human plans; he knows that they are futile.
Blessed is the one you discipline, Lord, the one you teach from your law;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: you grant them relief from days of trouble, till a pit is dug for the wicked.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For the Lord will not reject his people; he will never forsake his inheritance.
Judgment will again be founded on righteousness, and all the upright in heart will follow it.
Who will rise up for me against the wicked? Who will take a stand for me against evildoers?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Unless the Lord had given me help, I would soon have dwelt in the silence of death.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: When I said, 'My foot is slipping,' your unfailing love, Lord, supported me.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: When anxiety was great within me, your consolation brought me joy.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Can a corrupt throne be allied with you— a throne that brings on misery by its decrees?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The wicked band together against the righteous and condemn the innocent to death.
But the Lord has become my fortress, and my God the rock in whom I take refuge.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: He will repay them for their sins and destroy them for their wickedness; the Lord our God will destroy them.
